infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Sessn uses your camera to add photos to your workout posts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Sessn accesses your photo library to add images to your workout posts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Sessn saves workout images to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Sessn uses your location to tag your workouts with a gym or spot.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Sessn may use your microphone when recording workout clips.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Sessn sends push notifications for likes, follows, and group activity.
